name: OmopCoveragePayerPlanPeriodView
title: Coverage → payer_plan_period (flat)
description: FHIR Coverage captures a patient's insurance enrollment (payer, plan, coverage period, subscriber relationship). It maps to OMOP payer_plan_period, which records continuous enrollment under a specific health benefit plan from a given payer. Unlike clinical event tables, payer_plan_period carries no _type_concept_id; it is purely administrative. One active Coverage resource produces one payer_plan_period row. Overlapping or adjacent periods for the same person/payer may be collapsed.

column.name: payer_plan_period_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Generated via hash/sequence/lookup of Coverage.id.

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer person_id via the same ID mapping used by the Patient mapper.

column.name: payer_plan_period_start_date
column.description: Coverage start date. If absent, use ETL epoch or earliest known date. NOT NULL in OMOP.

column.name: payer_plan_period_end_date
column.description: Coverage end date. If absent or open-ended, use 9999-12-31 or ETL end date. NOT NULL in OMOP.

column.name: payer_concept_id
column.description: OMOP Payer vocabulary concept (vocabulary_id='Payer', domain_id='Payer'). Resolve Organization reference, map name to payer concept. Default: 0. If payor references Patient (self-pay), use concept_id 436. — transform: resolve payor[0] -> Organization.name -> OMOP Payer vocabulary lookup

column.name: payer_source_value
column.description: Verbatim payer name or identifier. Resolve Organization reference and extract Organization.name. Fallback to Reference.display. Truncate to 50 chars. — transform: resolve payor[0] -> Organization.name or Reference.display

column.name: plan_concept_id
column.description: Map Coverage.type to OMOP Plan vocabulary. No standard OMOP vocabulary maps directly to Coverage.type. Default: 0. — transform: map Coverage.type (v3-ActCode) to OMOP Plan vocabulary

column.name: plan_source_value
column.description: Plan name as it appears in source. Truncate to 50 chars. — transform: Use Coverage.type.text, or class entry where type.coding.code='plan'. Concatenate group+plan if both present.

column.name: sponsor_concept_id
column.description: OMOP Sponsor vocabulary concept. The policyHolder (often the employer) is the sponsor. Default: 0. — transform: resolve policyHolder -> Organization.name -> OMOP Sponsor vocabulary lookup

column.name: sponsor_source_value
column.description: Sponsor name from policyHolder reference. Truncate to 50 chars. — transform: resolve policyHolder -> Organization.name or identifier

column.name: family_source_value
column.description: The subscriber ID links all family members under the same policy. Truncate to 50 chars.
